cases.title: TS-18: Check-in with token scanned at T + 31 seconds returns ExpiredQr
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student authenticated
QrToken issued at time T with status Valid in database
TestClock fixed at T + 31 seconds
Student coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters
Student attendance status Pending for session
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from token issued at T, valid latitude/longitude using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert response message is Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for student and assert status remains Pending
cases.expected: Check-in rejected per BR-03 when currentTime > tokenIssuedAt + 30 s; ExpiredQr outcome with Vietnamese message; attendance unchanged

cases.title: TS-18 variant: Check-in within 30-second window succeeds before expiry
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student authenticated
QrToken issued at time T with status Valid
TestClock fixed at T + 15 seconds (mid-window)
Student coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId issued at T using Student session and in-radius coordinates
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status Consumed
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for student and assert status Present
cases.expected: Token within BR-03 30-second absolute window allows check-in to proceed; token consumed on success

cases.title: CheckInService rejects expired token at Layer 4 before GPS and duplicate checks
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session with enrolled Student and Pending attendance record
QrToken row with issued_at at T and expires_at at T + 30 s, status Valid
TestClock fixed at T + 31 seconds
CheckInService wired per validation-rules §5.1 step 7
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submitCheckIn with expired tokenId, valid coordinates, and enrolled Student context
Capture result outcome ExpiredQr without committing Present status
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status is Expired (not Consumed)
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId and assert status remains Pending
Insert check_in_attempts row and assert outcome ExpiredQr logged
cases.expected: BR-03 enforced at pipeline step 7; token marked Expired; no Present record; token not Consumed per BR-11 separation

cases.title: QrTokenRepository persists expires_at as issued_at plus 30 seconds on issuance
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session row exists with status Active
QrService.issueToken callable at fixed TestClock instant T
steps: Invoke QrService.issueToken(sessionId) at T
Query qr_tokens table for newest token row
Assert expires_at minus issued_at equals exactly 30 seconds
Assert status is Valid immediately after issuance
Assert expires_at field matches BR-03 absolute window definition
cases.expected: Token TTL stored as issued_at + 30 s per domain model §4.9 and BR-03; database enforces hard expiry boundary

cases.title: QrToken transitions Valid to Expired when currentTime exceeds issuedAt + 30 seconds
preconditions: Valid qr_tokens row in PostgreSQL with issued_at at T and expires_at at T + 30 s
CheckInService or QrService expiry handler uses TestClock at T + 31 s
steps: Record beforeState Valid from qr_tokens table for tokenId
Invoke CheckInService.submitCheckIn with tokenId at TestClock T + 31 s
Query qr_tokens row for tokenId after rejection
Assert afterState is Expired
cases.expected: beforeState Valid, afterState Expired per BR-03 outcome; token state Expired on failed expiry check

cases.title: POST /check-in with expired token returns 400 ExpiredQr envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session available
Expired qr_tokens row for Active session (status Expired or TestClock past expires_at)
Student coordinates within session radius
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response body outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert response body message Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
Assert response envelope matches check-in failure contract per API design §6.3
cases.expected: HTTP 400 ExpiredQr per validation-rules §4 BR-03 mapping and error-handling §2.1

cases.title: Check-in at T + 29 seconds succeeds; at T + 31 seconds returns ExpiredQr
preconditions: Active session with two enrolled Students (Student A and Student B) authenticated
QrToken issued at T for Student A check-in
Fresh QrToken issued at T2 for Student B check-in
Both students have in-radius coordinates and Pending attendance
steps: Set TestClock to T + 29 seconds and POST /api/v1/check-in with token from T using Student A session
Assert HTTP 200 with outcome Success (now ≤ issuedAt + 30 s per BR-03)
Set TestClock to T2 + 31 seconds and POST /api/v1/check-in with token from T2 using Student B session
Assert HTTP 400 with outcome ExpiredQr and Vietnamese expiry message
cases.expected: BR-03 boundary enforced: token valid at 29 s inclusive window; rejected when currentTime > issuedAt + 30 s; no exceptions

cases.title: Check-in at exactly issuedAt + 30 seconds still allowed (inclusive window end)
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student and Pending attendance
QrToken issued at T with expires_at T + 30 s
TestClock fixed at exactly T + 30 seconds (now ≤ issuedAt + 30 s)
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submitCheckIn at TestClock T + 30 s with tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert outcome Success when all other pipeline steps pass
Query qr_tokens and assert status Consumed
Query attendance_records and assert status Present
cases.expected: BR-03 condition requires currentTime > issuedAt + 30 s; at exact boundary check-in still permitted per validation-rules §5.1 step 7

cases.title: Check-in one millisecond after issuedAt + 30 seconds returns ExpiredQr
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student and Pending attendance
QrToken issued at T with expires_at T + 30 s
TestClock fixed at T + 30 seconds + 1 millisecond
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submitCheckIn with tokenId at advanced TestClock
Assert outcome ExpiredQr
Query qr_tokens and assert status Expired
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending
cases.expected: Strict greater-than boundary per BR-03 condition; immediate rejection past 30-second absolute window

cases.title: Flow B step 6: Expired token submission returns ExpiredQr anti-screenshot rejection
preconditions: Active session with valid QR from GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/qr/current (Flow B step 1)
Student A already checked in successfully (Flow B steps 2–3 complete)
TestClock advanced so original token from step 1 is past 30 s expiry (simulated screenshot share delay)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired tokenId from Flow B step 1 using enrolled Student C session
Assert HTTP 400 with outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert Vietnamese message Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
Verify Student C attendance remains Pending
Verify token status Expired in qr_tokens table
cases.expected: Flow B anti-fraud path validates BR-03 expired QR rejection preventing screenshot sharing beyond 30 s window

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in with expired token — BR-03 not evaluated for non-Student
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session is available
Active sessionId with expired QrToken exists
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit permission per roles-permissions §2.3
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired tokenId and valid coordinates using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify no check_in_attempts row with outcome ExpiredQr for instructor userId
Verify qr_tokens row status remains Expired without Consumed transition
cases.expected: Only Student role triggers BR-03 check-in pipeline; Instructor cannot submit check-in regardless of token expiry state

cases.title: ExpiredQr rejection does not consume token or create Present attendance
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session with Valid QrToken past expires_at (status Valid, TestClock T + 31 s)
Enrolled Student with Pending attendance record
steps: Begin database transaction wrapper for test isolation
Invoke CheckInService.submitCheckIn with expired tokenId
Assert outcome ExpiredQr and transaction rolled back or no side effects committed
Query qr_tokens and assert status is Expired not Consumed
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending with checked_in_at null
cases.expected: BR-03 failure is non-destructive; token not Consumed per BR-11; no duplicate Present risk on retry with fresh token

cases.title: Parallel check-in attempts as token crosses 30-second boundary yield at most one Success
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student and Valid QrToken issued at T
TestClock advances from T + 29 s to T + 31 s during parallel requests
Two parallel CheckInService.submitCheckIn calls with same tokenId
steps: Launch parallel check-in at TestClock T + 29 s and T + 31 s with same tokenId
Await both operations to settle
Count outcomes: at most one Success, remainder ExpiredQr or DuplicateCheckIn
Query qr_tokens and assert at most one Consumed transition
Query attendance_records and assert at most one Present for student
cases.expected: BR-03 expiry enforced under race at window boundary; no double Present from expired-token retry

cases.title: QrService lazy expiry marks Valid token Expired when getCurrentToken called after window
preconditions: Valid qr_tokens row with issued_at at T and expires_at at T + 30 s
QrService.getCurrentToken or rotateTokens uses TestClock at T + 31 s
Active session parent row exists
steps: Record beforeState Valid for tokenId
Invoke QrService.getCurrentToken(sessionId) or rotateTokens at T + 31 s
Query qr_tokens for expired tokenId
Assert afterState Expired
Assert getCurrentToken returns new Valid token with fresh 30 s window
cases.expected: Lazy ttlElapsed handler transitions stale Valid → Expired per BR-03; rotation issues replacement token

cases.title: Expired token check-in returns 400 before radius and duplicate pipeline steps execute
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Expired QrToken for Active session
Student coordinates deliberately outside session gpsRadiusMeters
Student already has no Present status (duplicate path not applicable)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired tokenId and out-of-radius coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 with outcome ExpiredQr (not OutOfRadius)
Assert errorCode ExpiredQr takes precedence per validation-rules §5.1 step 7 ordering
Verify check_in_attempts logged with outcome ExpiredQr not OutOfRadius
cases.expected: BR-03 evaluated at step 7 before BR-02 radius (step 13); ExpiredQr short-circuits pipeline per rule interaction matrix order 3

cases.title: Student scan of expired QR shows ExpiredQr on preflight; GPS step never mounts (AC-07d)
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport (375px width)
Active session with QR token issued more than 30 seconds ago (TestClock or stale tokenId)
Student navigates to check-in flow via scan or deep link
steps: Student scans QR or opens check-in deep link with expired tokenId
Verify client invokes GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight
Assert preflight HTTP status 403 with errorCode ExpiredQr per API design §6.2
Verify error panel displays Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
Verify GpsCaptureStep component is not mounted in DOM
Verify Quét lại action returns student to scanner view
Verify attendance status remains Pending in student history
cases.expected: BR-15 preflight gate blocks GPS capture when BR-03 expiry fails; student remains on scan step per AC-07d

cases.title: Instructor QR countdown reaches zero and refreshes before student can use stale code
preconditions: Instructor is logged in to instructor SPA with Active session
Instructor navigates to session QR tab with visible countdown
Student device ready to scan (simulated deep link capture)
steps: Observe QrCountdown decrement toward 0 within AC-06a 30-second token rotation cycle (5-second poll per API design §6.1)
Verify QR image or token payload changes when countdown reaches 0 and new token issued
Simulate student submitting check-in with previous tokenId via API or deep link
Verify student receives ExpiredQr error with Vietnamese message
Verify new QR scan with current token succeeds within fresh 30 s window
cases.expected: UI rotation cycle aligns with BR-03 30 s absolute validity; stale projector/snapshot codes rejected after refresh

cases.title: Student retry flow after ExpiredQr guides user to scan fresh QR from instructor display
preconditions: Authenticated Student on check-in page after ExpiredQr error
Instructor Active session displaying current valid QR
Student GPS permission granted
steps: Click Quét lại on ExpiredQr error panel
Verify camera/scanner view opens
Scan current valid QR from instructor display (or navigate fresh deep link)
Submit check-in with new tokenId within 30 s window
Verify success confirmation and Present status displayed
cases.expected: BR-03 rejection is recoverable via fresh token scan; UX path from expired to success within new 30 s window

cases.title: Flow A: Student checks in with fresh token within 30 s of GET /qr/current poll
preconditions: Instructor opened session to Active (Flow A steps 1–2)
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current returns token with secondsRemaining ≥ 20
Authenticated enrolled Student with in-radius coordinates
steps: Capture tokenId from instructor QR poll within 10 seconds of issuance
Student POST /api/v1/check-in immediately with captured tokenId
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success
Assert token Consumed and attendance Present
Re-submit same tokenId after TestClock T + 31 s and assert ExpiredQr or TokenAlreadyUsed
cases.expected: Flow A happy path respects BR-03 window for initial check-in; stale reuse blocked after expiry or consumption

cases.title: TokenNotFound and ExpiredQr are distinct outcomes for missing vs expired tokens
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student authenticated
Random UUID tokenId not present in qr_tokens table
Separate expired tokenId with status Expired in database
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with non-existent tokenId and assert HTTP 404 TokenNotFound
POST /api/v1/check-in with expired tokenId and assert HTTP 400 ExpiredQr
Assert errorCode values differ between responses
Assert Vietnamese ExpiredQr message only on expired token path
cases.expected: BR-03 ExpiredQr applies only to known tokens past validity window; unknown tokens return TokenNotFound per domain model §3.5

cases.title: TS-21b: Preflight rejects expired token before GPS step (AC-07d)
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session available
QrToken issued at time T with status Valid in database
TestClock fixed at T + 31 seconds
Active session within attendance window
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session at T + 31 s
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert response message is Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
Assert no check_in_attempts row created (read-only preflight per API design §6.2 and validation-rules §3.6a)
Verify client would not mount GpsCaptureStep per BR-15 gate
cases.expected: BR-03 expiry enforced at preflight step 3 per validation-rules §3.6a; GET preflight returns HTTP 403 ExpiredQr per API design §6.2 (distinct from POST 400 per §6.3); expired token blocked before GPS capture per BR-15 and AC-07d

cases.title: PreflightService rejects token past issuedAt + 30 s at step 3 without DB writes
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session with enrolled Student and Pending attendance record
QrToken row with issued_at at T, expires_at T + 30 s, status Valid
TestClock fixed at T + 31 seconds
PreflightService wired to QrTokenRepository, SessionRepository, and EnrollmentRepository per validation-rules §3.6a
steps: Invoke PreflightService.validate(tokenId, enrolledStudentId) at TestClock T + 31 s
Assert result outcome ExpiredQr (not Valid or TokenAlreadyUsed)
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status is not Consumed
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId and assert status remains Pending
Verify no check_in_attempts row inserted (read-only preflight per API design §6.2)
cases.expected: BR-03 absolute 30-second window enforced at preflight step 3 before GPS capture; read-only ExpiredQr outcome with zero attendance or attempt side effects per BR-15
